// <auto-generated/>
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Threading;
using Microsoft.Win32;

namespace Lithnet.Ecma2Framework.Generated
{
    internal static class Ecma2MetadirectoryServicesResolver
    {
        private const string AssemblySimpleName = "Microsoft.MetadirectoryServicesEx";
        private const string FileName = "Microsoft.MetadirectoryServicesEx.dll";
        private const string PathOverrideVariable = "LITHNET_ECMA2_MMS_PATH";
        private const string SyncServiceParametersKey = "SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\services\\FIMSynchronizationService\\Parameters";
        private const string SyncServicePathValue = "Path";

        private static int registered;

        [System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
        internal static void Initialize()
        {
            if (Interlocked.CompareExchange(ref registered, 1, 0) == 0)
            {
                AppDomain.CurrentDomain.AssemblyResolve += Resolve;
            }
        }

        private static Assembly Resolve(object sender, ResolveEventArgs args)
        {
            if (!string.Equals(new AssemblyName(args.Name).Name, AssemblySimpleName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return null;
            }

            return Assembly.LoadFrom(ResolvePath());
        }

        private static string ResolvePath()
        {
            string overridePath = Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(PathOverrideVariable);

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(overridePath))
            {
                if (!File.Exists(overridePath))
                {
                    throw new FileNotFoundException(
                        string.Format("The '{0}' environment variable points to '{1}', but no file exists there.", PathOverrideVariable, overridePath),
                        overridePath);
                }

                return overridePath;
            }

            string syncServicePath = ReadSyncServicePath();

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(syncServicePath))
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException(
                    string.Format(
                        "Microsoft.MetadirectoryServicesEx could not be located. The MIM Synchronization Service install path was not found at the registry value '{0}\\{1}', and the '{2}' environment variable is not set.",
                        SyncServiceParametersKey, SyncServicePathValue, PathOverrideVariable));
            }

            string path = Path.Combine(syncServicePath, "Bin", "Assemblies", FileName);

            if (!File.Exists(path))
            {
                throw new FileNotFoundException(
                    string.Format("Microsoft.MetadirectoryServicesEx was not found at '{0}', derived from the MIM Synchronization Service install path.", path),
                    path);
            }

            return path;
        }

        private static string ReadSyncServicePath()
        {
            using (RegistryKey baseKey = RegistryKey.OpenBaseKey(RegistryHive.LocalMachine, RegistryView.Registry64))
            using (RegistryKey key = baseKey.OpenSubKey(SyncServiceParametersKey))
            {
                if (key == null)
                {
                    return null;
                }

                return key.GetValue(SyncServicePathValue) as string;
            }
        }
    }
}
